summary: Tested Regularization feature (iteration 87). Backend API tests: 14/14 passed. Frontend tests: Regularization modal works, short reason validation works, manager can create but not update-date. Found critical frontend bug: tab resets to 'commande' when date filter changes.

ui_bugs.issue: Tab resets to 'commande' when filterDate changes. Line 874-876 in useEffect (line 878 dependency) calls setActiveTab('commande') every time filterDate changes, not just on initial load. This prevents users from staying on Factures tab when changing dates.

integration_issues.issue: Cannot verify regularization badges (regul-badge-{id}) and update-date buttons (open-regul-update-{id}) because tab keeps resetting to 'commande' when date is changed

action_items: FIX CRITICAL: In CaissePage.jsx line 874-876, move setActiveTab('commande') to a separate useEffect that only runs on initial authentication, not when filterDate changes. Example fix: create a useRef to track if initial tab has been set.
After fixing tab reset bug, verify that regularization badges (data-testid='regul-badge-{id}') appear next to '✓ Validée' for regularized invoices
After fixing tab reset bug, verify that CalendarClock 'Modifier la date' button (data-testid='open-regul-update-{id}') is visible ONLY for admin role, not for manager
critical_code_review_comments: CaissePage.jsx line 878: useEffect dependency array includes filterDate, which causes setActiveTab('commande') to be called every time date changes. This is a bug - the tab should only be set on initial load.
Suggested fix: Use a useRef to track if initial tab has been set, or move the setActiveTab call to a separate useEffect with only [isAuthenticated, currentUser] as dependencies

success_rate.frontend: 70% (regularization modal, short reason validation, manager role restrictions work; tab reset bug prevents full verification)

seed_data_creation: Created 3 regularized invoices for 2026-05-28 via backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regularization API is fully working. Frontend has a tab reset bug that needs to be fixed before verifying regularization badges and update-date buttons in the Factures tab. The 'FACTURES À IMPRIMER' section in CommandeTab shows regularized invoices with -R suffix but doesn't have the badges/buttons - those are only in the Factures tab (TabsContent value='invoices').
